title: Copying data from 2 columns in 1 board to 1 column in the target board.  So on the Target board,  we would have 1 column and Item A might pull from the 1st column in the source board and Item B might pull from the 2nd column in the source board.

posts.author: Strick (Mike Strickler)
posts.cookedHtml: Copying data from 2 columns in 1 board to 1 column in the target board. So on the Target board, we would have 1 column and Item A might pull from the 1st column in the source board and Item B might pull from the 2nd column in the source board.
